mapper.select: SELECT symbol, calculated_at, quality_score, quality_label, tone, coverage_score, freshness_score, outlier_score, consistency_score, issue_count, excluded_metric_count, stale_sources_json, excluded_fields_json, issues_json, raw_json FROM stock_data_quality_latest WHERE symbol = #{symbol}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_data_quality_latest ( symbol, calculated_at, quality_score, quality_label, tone, coverage_score, freshness_score, outlier_score, consistency_score, issue_count, excluded_metric_count, stale_sources_json, excluded_fields_json, issues_json, raw_json ) VALUES ( #{symbol}, #{calculatedAt}, #{qualityScore}, #{qualityLabel}, #{tone}, #{coverageScore}, #{freshnessScore}, #{outlierScore}, #{consistencyScore}, #{issueCount}, #{excludedMetricCount}, #{staleSourcesJson}, #{excludedFieldsJson}, #{issuesJson}, #{rawJson} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE calculated_at = VALUES(calculated_at), quality_score = VALUES(quality_score), quality_label = VALUES(quality_label), tone = VALUES(tone), coverage_score = VALUES(coverage_score), freshness_score = VALUES(freshness_score), outlier_score = VALUES(outlier_score), consistency_score = VALUES(consistency_score), issue_count = VALUES(issue_count), excluded_metric_count = VALUES(excluded_metric_count), stale_sources_json = VALUES(stale_sources_json), excluded_fields_json = VALUES(excluded_fields_json), issues_json = VALUES(issues_json), raw_json = VALUES(raw_json)
